function.arguments: {"parquet_files": "[\"/home/nn/SOTA-agents/RCAgentEval/eval-data/aiq-qwen3.5-plus/data_c727759f/abnormal_metrics.parquet\"]", "query": "SELECT service_name, metric, AVG(value) as avg_val, MAX(value) as max_val FROM abnormal_metrics WHERE metric LIKE '%http%' AND service_name IS NOT NULL AND service_name != '' GROUP BY service_name, metric ORDER BY avg_val DESC LIMIT 20", "limit": 20}

function.name: think_tool
function.arguments:
{"reflection": "Based on my investigation, I have gathered substantial evidence about the root cause:

1. **ts-travel-service is the clear root cause**: 
   - It has 78 error spans (all errors in the system), far more than any other service
   - All errors have HTTP status codes 500 or 503
   - The errors occur in spans like `POST /api/v1/travelservice/trip_detail`, `TravelController.getTripAllDetailInfo`, `POST /api/v1/travelservice/trips/left`
   - Duration of error spans is extremely high (3-4 seconds)

2. **Error propagation path**:
   - Looking at trace `5e6f5a57b3da95cfe548d86be942c9ce`:
     - loadgenerator → ts-ui-dashboard → ts-preserve-service → ts-travel-service (ERROR)
   - ts-travel-service returns 500/503 errors to callers
   - ts-preserve-service receives errors from ts-travel-service but shows status "Unset" with HTTP 200 (it may be swallowing errors or handling them poorly)
